holdings.infoBox: TFGZ is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 9.92%, Alphabet at 7.45%, Broadcom at 6.94%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 4.77%, and Meta Platforms at 4.76%.

overview.description: The Thornburg Focus Growth Fund ETF (TFGZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through exposure to a narrow portfolio of US growth companies. Holdings are grouped into three baskets: growth industry leaders, consistent growers, and emerging growth companies. TFGZ was launched on Dec 27, 2000 and is issued by Thornburg.
